text.message: If you weren't so greedy black I wouldn't have had to be
If I let you onto the 8 ore you just have an insane setup
I'm not trying to just feed
if i take 3 11 10 will you take 8 - 3?
But will need help with sheep
Dang, I gotta get me some of those dev cards
haha its ok, was risky strta
Is risky but do you bro
Look, I wasn't expecting the 7, okay D:
You can’t even keep your words red
And we can help each other out
I mean, you can just get army
It's the only resource you dont make
Compared to the resource you have the most of
But you're just doing this to yourself
You're not out of it if you just try
Getting you on wheat for a 1 for 1
You can get army, you can get traded resources you need
Is not a great deal for me
And you even said I was dead with you
So why are you scared of me then?
I just dont want to help your position
If you think I'm dead then you shouldn't be that afraid of it being a good deal for me, you should hope yourself
Why are you just playing to lose?
I don’t have any place to go now
Just not going to help you
I'm not patronising you, I'm trying to help you
